title: deal.listed (v1)
description: Published by the Approvals Service when all listing calls succeed, or partially succeeds with some failed channels. See TDD Sections 3.2.1, 5.4, 5.5.

approval_id.description: The approval record that triggered the listing.

user_id.description: The user who owns the deal.

sell_channel.description: The primary sell channel where the item was listed.

failed_channels.description: Channels where listing failed. Empty when all succeed. User must list manually on these channels.

listing_id.description: Identifier for the successful listing on the sell channel.

listed_at.description: Timestamp when the listing went live.
